ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was registered in the system */,
  "red_level" REAL /* Red blood cell level of the patient */,
  "green_level" REAL /* Green blood cell level of the patient */,
  "blue_level" REAL /* Blue blood cell level of the patient */,
  "hb_level" REAL /* Hemoglobin level of the patient (g/dl) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blood test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted (e.g., complete blood count, blood chemistry) */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the blood test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* Person who conducted the test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., scheduled, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, summary) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)
